nodes.name: canonicalize-node-modules.ts
nodes.summary: Deduplicates Bun's internal node_modules by selecting the highest semver version of each package and rebuilding symlinks under a canonical directory.

nodes.name: normalize-bun-binaries.ts
nodes.summary: Rebuilds .bin symlinks inside Bun's internal node_modules cache by reading package.json bin fields and creating normalized symlinks for each binary.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Bun-specific APIs (Bun.file, Bun.semver) for filesystem and semver operations.

nodes.name: collectPackages
nodes.summary: Walks a node_modules directory collecting all package directories including scoped packages.

nodes.name: linkBinary
nodes.summary: Creates a relative symlink from a .bin directory to a package's binary file, handling deduplication via a seen set.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root monorepo package.json defining workspaces, shared dependency catalog, dev tooling (turbo, husky, prettier), and workspace dependencies for the aboocode project.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Brief agent-facing guide describing the project's database layer using Drizzle ORM with SQLite and migration conventions.

nodes.name: aboo
nodes.summary: CLI entry point script that locates the correct platform-specific aboocode binary based on OS, architecture, and AVX2/musl support, then executes it with pass-through arguments.

nodes.name: supportsAvx2
nodes.summary: Detects whether the current CPU supports AVX2 instructions by parsing /proc/cpuinfo on Linux or running sysctl on macOS.

nodes.name: findBinary
nodes.summary: Traverses parent directories to find the platform-specific native binary by searching node_modules for the matching platform package.

nodes.name: aboocode
nodes.summary: Alias CLI entry point (identical to bin/aboo) that locates and launches the correct platform-specific native binary for the aboocode tool.

nodes.name: opencode
nodes.summary: Backward-compatible CLI entry point (identical to bin/aboo) preserving the original 'opencode' command name for users migrating from the upstream project.

nodes.name: BUN_SHELL_MIGRATION_PLAN.md
nodes.summary: Phased migration plan for replacing child_process spawns with Bun shell APIs, covering a proposed process utility API, rollout phases, validation strategy, and risk mitigation.

nodes.name: bunfig.toml
nodes.summary: Bun runtime configuration specifying preload scripts and test-specific preload settings for the aboocode package.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Multi-stage multi-architecture Docker build producing a minimal Alpine container with the aboocode binary, supporting both amd64 and arm64 targets with ripgrep included.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses ARG TARGETARCH with dynamic FROM to select the correct architecture stage at build time.

nodes.name: drizzle.config.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM configuration for SQLite, pointing schema discovery at src/**/*.sql.ts files and outputting migrations to the migration directory.

nodes.name: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
nodes.summary: Detailed implementation plan for the aboocode fork covering rebranding, hot-reload for agents/skills/tools, agent-team integration, parallel subagent execution, and verification phases.

nodes.name: project
nodes.summary: Core project table storing workspace metadata including worktree path, VCS type, name, icon, and sandbox configuration.

nodes.name: session
nodes.summary: Session table tracking conversation sessions with project association, sharing state, diff summaries, and archival timestamps.

nodes.name: message
nodes.summary: Message table storing conversation messages linked to sessions with JSON data payload.

nodes.name: snapshot.json
nodes.summary: Drizzle migration snapshot capturing the initial database schema DDL state for the familiar_lady_ursula migration.

nodes.name: add_project_commands
nodes.summary: Empty migration placeholder for the add_project_commands schema change, with actual DDL captured only in the snapshot.

nodes.name: snapshot.json
nodes.summary: Drizzle migration snapshot for the add_project_commands migration, recording cumulative DDL state after adding project command support.

nodes.name: control_account
nodes.summary: Creates the control_account table for storing OAuth credentials with email and URL as composite primary key, supporting token refresh and expiry tracking.

nodes.name: snapshot.json
nodes.summary: Drizzle migration snapshot for the wakeful_the_professor migration including the control_account table definition.

nodes.name: memory
nodes.summary: Memory table storing categorized knowledge entries (facts, preferences, patterns) linked to projects and optionally to sessions, with tag support.

nodes.name: entity
nodes.summary: Entity table for the knowledge graph storing named entities with types, observations, and tags, linked to projects via foreign key.

nodes.name: relation
nodes.summary: Relation table connecting entities in the knowledge graph with typed, described relationships, enabling a project-scoped entity-relation model.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Main aboocode package manifest defining CLI binary entry points (aboo, aboocode, opencode), build scripts, dependencies including Drizzle ORM, Vercel AI SDK, and tree-sitter, with platform-specific optional dependencies.

nodes.name: parsers-config.ts
nodes.summary: Tree-sitter parser configuration mapping language file types to WASM parser URLs and syntax highlighting/locals queries from nvim-treesitter for the TUI code viewer.
nodes.languageNotes: Exports a default object with parser configs referencing remote WASM binaries and SCM query files from tree-sitter and nvim-treesitter repos.

nodes.name: postinstall.mjs
nodes.summary: npm postinstall script that detects the current platform/architecture, finds the matching native binary from platform-specific packages, and hard-links or copies it to bin/.aboocode for fast CLI startup.

nodes.name: detectPlatformAndArch
nodes.summary: Maps Node.js os.platform() and os.arch() values to normalized platform and architecture strings used for binary package lookup.

nodes.name: findBinary
nodes.summary: Resolves the platform-specific binary package via require.resolve and returns the path to the native binary executable.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the postinstall process: skips on Windows, finds the platform binary, and creates a hard link (or copy) at bin/.aboocode.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project README covering installation, usage, configuration, development workflow, agent team system, memory system, debug logging, and E2E test instructions for aboocode.

nodes.name: build.ts
nodes.summary: Cross-platform build script that compiles aboocode into native binaries for 10 target combinations (Linux/macOS/Windows, x64/arm64, glibc/musl, AVX2/baseline) using Bun.build with embedded migrations and optional GitHub release upload.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Bun.build compile mode to produce standalone native binaries with bundled migrations and worker scripts.

nodes.name: check-migrations.ts
nodes.summary: CI guard script that runs drizzle-kit check to verify the schema is in sync with migrations, failing with actionable guidance if drift is detected.
